caption: The video depicts a medical professional, dressed in blue scrubs and wearing a surgical mask and cap, standing at a desk in what appears to be a clinical or educational setting. The individual is leaning slightly forward, with one hand resting on the desk and the other holding a pen, suggesting they are either writing or reviewing documents. On the desk, there is a green folder, some papers, and a smartphone. In the background, an open doorway leads to another room where a bed covered with a blue sheet is visible, indicating a patient care area. The scene is labeled "Day 1" and "Sim Week," implying that this is part of a simulation exercise for medical training. The overall atmosphere suggests a focused and professional environment aimed at preparing healthcare students for real-world scenarios.
